title: GravityGun
description: Gravity gun plugin that can even catch players
body:
Gravity Gun plugin that can even grab players

Command List:
/gg give player: Get a Gravity Gun item
/gg reload: Reload the config file

Gravity Gun Usage:
Look at a target and right-click: Pick up the target
Hold a target and right-click: Drop the target
Hold a target and left-click: Throw the target
Hold a target and hold Shift+right-click: Forcefully release the target

**config.yml**
\plugins\GravityGun

```
messages:
  prefix: "&b[GG]&r "
item:
  material: BLAZE_ROD
  name: "&bGravity Gun"
mechanics:
  range: 16.0
  hold_distance: 3.0
  launch_power: 2.6
  tick_smooth: true
limits:
  allow_grab_players: true
  blacklist:
    - ENDER_DRAGON
    - WITHER
    - WARDEN
cooldown:
  grab_ms: 300


```

Supported Versions: 1.21x
Tested Version: 1.21.7
